overall.description: Gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai warrior walking from a foggy river valley to a coastal cliff at sunset. The character traverses the 'Stone Jaw Coast' as weather transitions from overcast fog to golden hour, ending with a panoramic view of the ocean.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy riverbank path between white cliffs and calm water

agents.ego_description: samurai character walking steadily along the foggy riverbank with swords on back

entered.detail: tall white rocky cliff face covered with sparse vegetation
calm river water with mist hovering above the surface
single windswept pine tree growing on the riverbank
distant wooden structures with vertical red banners atop the cliff

segments.scene_description: The samurai walks along a narrow dirt trail between a white cliff face and a misty river. The atmosphere is foggy and overcast, with limited visibility of the distant mountains. A solitary pine tree stands on the right bank while wooden fortifications with red banners are barely visible in the distance.

events.description: on-screen text 'STONE JAW COAST' appears as environment transitions from calm river to wavy coastline
character begins ascending gradual slope along the coastline

agents.ego_description: samurai continues walking along the coastline as ocean waves crash against rocks nearby

entered.detail: churning ocean waves crashing against the rocky shoreline
jagged rocks and boulders along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The scene opens to a wide coastal area as the samurai leaves the river valley behind. Ocean waves crash against rocky outcrops on the right while the white cliffs recede into the distance on the left. The location text 'STONE JAW COAST' appears on screen. The character ascends a grassy slope along the shoreline, with distant wooden fortifications still visible through the overcast haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliff overlook at golden hour

events.description: sun breaks through clouds creating dramatic golden hour lighting with warm orange glow
character stops walking and stands at cliff edge overlooking the ocean sunset

agents.ego_description: samurai walks to cliff edge then stops to observe the sunset over the ocean, eventually turning to survey the surroundings

entered.detail: bright sun low on the horizon casting golden light across the ocean
sandy beach visible below the cliff edge
rocky outcrop where the character stands overlooking the ocean
wooden shipwreck remains on the beach below

segments.scene_description: The weather clears dramatically as golden sunlight floods the scene. The samurai reaches a rocky cliff edge overlooking the expansive ocean with the sun setting on the horizon. After walking along the cliff, the character stops to gaze at the shimmering water below. The camera pans around to reveal the wooden fortifications with red banners now much closer on the left, and shipwreck debris scattered along the beach.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, foggy river valley that gradually opens into a vast, sun-drenched coastal cliffside. It begins with a samurai walking a narrow dirt trail between a white cliff face and a misty river, where visibility is limited and distant red banners are barely discernible through the overcast haze. As the character leaves the valley, the scene expands into a wide coastal area where ocean waves crash against rocky outcrops and the terrain shifts to a grassy slope along the shoreline. The weather then clears dramatically, shifting from gray to golden sunlight as the samurai ascends to a rocky cliff edge overlooking the expansive ocean at sunset. Finally, the camera pans across the shimmering water to reveal shipwreck debris on the beach and the wooden fortifications with red banners now standing clearly in the warm light.
